benefits.description: Cut from 285 to 225 lbs; gained approximately 10 lbs of muscle during cut (body recomp at higher body fat)
Gained 10 lbs of muscle while cutting from 285 to 225 lbs

side_effects.description: Elevated fasting blood glucose (FBG floats up with Reta due to glucagon activity, problematic when paired with GH)
Carb cravings at night on Reta

protocol_notes: Has run both Reta and tirz paired with GH, but not GH analogues with them. States tirz + GH + caloric deficit is superior combo. Considers Reta potentially superior only as first GLP or during a bulk. Has not seen anyone benefit from switching tirz to Reta for weight loss. Wife also on hormonal therapy (perimenopausal, QOL and energy improvements). Recommends hormone panel for all clients.
